eventTriggers.description: BTC/ETH/SOL tests a framework-valid reclaim or rejection level. Wake to chart-check + possibly open or manage position.
My open paper position hits a pre-defined scale-out zone (favorable swing reaching 25-50% target). Wake to scale 25-50% off and bank cushion.
My open paper position approaches its stop (within 20% of stop distance). Wake to re-verify: is the stop still valid, or has the chart invalidated the thesis?
Day-bias-trigger level breaks (e.g., bullish-day thesis breaks when SOL loses 89 support cleanly). Wake to pivot or stand down.
Pump detector (once built) fires a breakout-fire signal on a coin in arming state. Wake to chart-check + decide whether to enter per framework.
Material macro/event outside the current position's entry thesis (geopolitical, exchange halt, major outage, central bank surprise). Wake to close or hedge regardless of chart state.

notes: Config written 2026-04-16 session 273 after James locked the full trading framework.
Style explicitly uses the framework we built. If the comp reveals this style loses to Oracle's or Builder's, results speak — no forced style changes mid-comp.
